failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items even though the tool returned two valid matches above the price threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer which available Mechanical Keyboard items with RGB backlight cost more than $233.90. The required tool call was made correctly, and the tool returned two matching items with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, claiming no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator repeated the same incorrect interpretation.
